data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention biometric data collection at all, so no data minimization measures specific to biometric data are described.
The policy does not mention health data collection at all, so no data minimization assessment can be made for this category.
The policy does not mention physiological data collection at all, so no data minimization measures for this category are described.

collected.policy_snippet: The personal data we collect includes name, gender, enterprise name, job position, postal and email addresses, phone number, login information (account and password), photos, and certificate information, etc., depending on how you interact with Huawei
collected.purpose: Photos are explicitly listed as collected personal data. Additionally, the policy mentions recording how users interact with websites, products, or services, which may include location or movement data, though this is not explicitly stated.
collected.legal_basis: contract, consent, legitimate interest, legal obligation

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy lists photos as collected physical data but does not provide specific justification for why photos are necessary for each stated purpose. The policy makes general statements about collecting data for various purposes without clearly limiting the scope of physical data collection or explaining why each type is strictly necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary for the purposes stated in this Policy, unless otherwise extending the retention period is required or permitted by law.
stored.purpose: Physical data such as photos, collected as personal data, is retained as long as necessary for the business purposes described in the policy, including providing products and services.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: After you deregister your account, we will stop providing you with products and services through your account and delete your relevant personal data, provided that deletion is not otherwise stipulated by special legal requirements.

shared.policy_snippet: Huawei shares your personal data with other partners, as described in this Policy, when services are provided by partners authorized by Huawei. For example, when you make an online purchase from Huawei, we must share your personal data with the logistics provider to arrange shipment or a partner to provide services.
shared.purpose: Physical data (as part of personal data) may be shared with authorized partners to fulfill service requests such as logistics and delivery.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Photos are explicitly listed as collected physical data without clear justification for their necessity across all use cases, raising concerns about proportionality. Physical data may be shared with third-party partners and transferred internationally to countries with potentially lower data protection standards, though Huawei states it uses legal mechanisms such as standard contractual clauses. Retention is vaguely defined as 'no longer than necessary,' leaving users uncertain about how long their physical data is kept.

collected.policy_snippet: We may also obtain data by recording how you interact with our websites, products, or services. For example, we may use technologies like cookies or receive use data from software running on your device.
collected.purpose: Huawei collects behavioral data (interaction data, usage data) to understand how users use their websites, products, and services, to improve services, provide customized user experience, and for marketing and analytics purposes.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy describes broad collection of behavioral data including how users interact with websites, products, and services, usage data from software, and tracking via cookies, web beacons, and pixel tags. No concrete limits are specified on what behavioral data is collected, and the purposes listed are wide-ranging, suggesting collection beyond what may be strictly necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We will retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary for the purposes stated in this Policy, unless otherwise extending the retention period is required or permitted by law.
stored.purpose: Behavioral data, as part of personal data, is retained for business purposes including providing products and services, improving performance, and ensuring security, for as long as necessary.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: We will retain your personal information for no longer than is necessary for the purposes stated in this Policy, unless otherwise extending the retention period is required or permitted by law.

shared.policy_snippet: Huawei shares your personal data with other partners, as described in this Policy, when services are provided by partners authorized by Huawei... as a global company, we may share personal data with Huawei affiliates and subsidiaries.
shared.purpose: Behavioral data, as part of personal data, is shared with authorized partners to provide services, and with Huawei affiliates and subsidiaries as part of global operations.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Huawei collects broad behavioral data through cookies, web beacons, pixel tags, and usage tracking with wide-ranging purposes and no clear limits on scope. This data is shared with partners, affiliates, and subsidiaries globally, including transfers to countries without adequate data protection levels, posing significant privacy risks. Retention is vaguely defined as 'no longer than necessary,' leaving users uncertain about how long their behavioral data is kept.
